summary: Tested back button navigation in demo modes and football drive yards calculation. Back buttons work correctly in all demo modes (navigate to /). However, found a critical bug in Football Advanced Mode drive yards calculation - shows incorrect negative yards due to React state timing issue.

ui_bugs.issue: Drive yards calculation shows incorrect value (-60 instead of +10) due to React state timing issue. The startNewDrive function uses stale ballPosition from closure instead of the newly set newBallPos value.

action_items: Fix drive yards calculation in FootballLiveGame.jsx - the startNewDrive function at line 800 uses stale ballPosition. Need to pass newBallPos directly or use useEffect to ensure correct ball position is used for startPosition.
critical_code_review_comments: FootballLiveGame.jsx line 800: startNewDrive('kickoff', receivingTeam) is called after setBallPosition(newBallPos) at line 776, but due to React's async state updates, ballPosition in the startNewDrive closure is still the old value. This causes startPosition to be incorrect (25 instead of 75 for away team touchback), resulting in wrong netYards calculation.

Fix suggestion: Modify startNewDrive to accept an optional startPosition parameter, or use a ref to track ball position, or wrap startNewDrive call in a setTimeout/useEffect to ensure state is updated.
seed_data_creation: Created test user and session for API testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Back button navigation in all demo modes works correctly (navigates to /). Football Advanced Mode has a drive yards calculation bug - the startNewDrive function uses stale ballPosition from React closure. Backend lineup persistence API works correctly.

back_button_navigation.football_advanced_mode: PASS - navigates to / (when modal is closed)

football_drive_yards.issue: Shows -60 yards instead of +10 yards after a 10 yard gain
football_drive_yards.root_cause: React state timing issue - startNewDrive uses stale ballPosition from closure
